name: Tech Bucks Trend, Hack Threats Up
description: Wired covers IDC's 2003 IT-spending forecast (6% growth) and competing analyst views. Aberdeen Group's Peter Kastner counters that 6% IT growth is 'totally unsustainable in this economy,' placing his own forecast at 3%. The article also covers IDC's ten-trend list including security, wireless networking, and tech as utility.
